en: Hey, I don't know about this. I don't either, but who gives a shit? No one's watching. What do you care?
Wait. This is crazy. You want me to hit you?
That's right. What? Like in the face?
Surprise me. This is so fucking stupid.
Motherfucker! You hit me in the ear.
Well, Jesus, I'm sorry. Ow! Christ!
By the ear, man! I fucked it up. No, that was perfect.
